page_title: Amigo Global — Goods from around the world

hero.title:
Make cross-border
wholesale
as **simple** as
local buying.
hero.desc: Amigo Global is a B2B/B2C cross-border marketplace connecting the United States with global buyers and sellers. We focus on general merchandise, clearance inventory, and wholesale supply so one app can connect sellers with millions of buyers.

business.title: Four business pillars covering the cross-border trade journey
business.lead: From sourcing to fulfillment, and from payment settlement to compliance, Amigo Global gives sellers and buyers modular services that make international commerce easier to run.

cards.title: Listing Fees
cards.desc: Sellers can join and list products for free. Amigo Global only earns when sellers make a successful transaction.

cards.title: Platform Commission
cards.desc: Each completed transaction carries only a 5% service fee, significantly below many mainstream marketplaces.

cards.title: Dual-Market Coverage
cards.desc: One product can serve wholesale buyers and retail consumers with unified fulfillment and settlement.

cards.title: Supported Countries
cards.desc: With Stripe's global payment network, sellers can receive compliant payouts across 46 countries and regions.

news.title: Latest updates
news.lead: Follow the latest Amigo Global developments.

cards.title: The Amigo Global app is in beta testing
cards.summary: A simpler way to source, sell, and shop across borders is coming soon.

cta.title:
Whether you are a brand, buyer
or **investor**, we would like to meet you.
